title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Spiral Review
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a tested tool-loop state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Validate tool arguments and results at the host boundary.
Parallelize independent reads while sequencing dependent or mutating calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
